name: Database Reactivation Workflow (4)
description: Build an automated Database Reactivation Workflow in Python that identifies dormant customers via Google Sheets, generates personalized AI-driven reactivation messages via Claude API, and sends them via email. It needs both a demo mode (prints to console/file) and production mode (real email sending). Target clients are SMBs with 4000+ inactive leads (gyms, dental clinics, coaching). Research similar workflows, email deliverability best practices, churn scoring, and open-source precedents first. Then ask 20-30 clarifying questions before building.
